evals.description: Triggers on request for character state management
evals.prompt: My player character has idle, run, jump, and attack states. How should I structure this in my game?

evals.description: Triggers on object pooling performance question
evals.prompt: My bullet hell game drops frames when spawning hundreds of projectiles. How do I fix this?

evals.description: Triggers on game event system architecture question
evals.prompt: How do I decouple my damage system from the UI health bar and sound effects in my game?

evals.description: Can implement a finite state machine with typed states
evals.prompt: Write a TypeScript state machine for a game character with Idle, Running, and Jumping states

evals.description: Can implement an object pool with acquire/release
evals.prompt: Implement a generic object pool in TypeScript for my game's particle system

evals.description: Can implement command pattern with undo for game editor
evals.prompt: I'm building a level editor and need undo/redo. Show me the command pattern in TypeScript.

evals.description: Can implement a typed event bus for game systems
evals.prompt: Create a type-safe event system in TypeScript where game systems can subscribe to typed events like DamageTaken and EnemyKilled

evals.description: Can use commands for replay system
evals.prompt: How do I implement a replay system for my game using the command pattern?
I have isJumping, isAttacking, isDashing booleans for my character. Is this a good approach?

evals.description: Handles edge case of unbounded command history
evals.prompt: My game's undo system uses more and more memory the longer the player plays. What's wrong?
Enemies in my game keep reacting to events after they're destroyed. What's happening?

evals.description: Does not invent game patterns that don't exist
evals.prompt: How do I implement the Reactive Entity Mesh pattern for my game's AI?

evals.description: References state-machines.md for hierarchical FSM detail
evals.prompt: My AI needs nested states - a patrol state that contains sub-states for walking and looking around. How do I architect this?
